name: Genevieve Elmheart
description_en: Genevieve is one of the Demacian Rangers under Quinn's command. She has a greathorn named 5 Cern as her partner. Genevieve informed House Durand about a Noxian attack and led their Petricite constructs into battle.
description_fr: Geneviève est l'une des Rangers Demaciens sous le commandement de Quinn. Elle a une grande corne nommée 5 Cern comme partenaire. Geneviève informa la Maison Durand d'une attaque noxienne et mena leurs constructions Pétricite au combat.
